channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten 动画 Gets English Dub
item.description: All 12 dubbed episodes launch on Wednesday; Crunchyroll Manga adds more series ― Crunchyroll announced on Monday an English dub for the television anime of Saekisan's The Angel Next Door Spoils Me... | 来源: ANN | 原文: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten Anime Gets English Dub

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList Mononoke Gets 新作 动画 Project
